summary: Completed testing of 4 new WMS features: cascading dropdowns in Receiving, Operador/Picking column in Orders, 3 tabs in Picking (Pendientes/Completadas/Dashboard), and ticket editing. All backend (14/14) and frontend tests passed.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/wms/inventory/options returns 'customers' field - PASS
Backend: Cascading filter works (manufacturer filtered by customer, style by manufacturer, color by style) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/wms/orders-with-tickets returns map of order_number -> pick tickets array with ticket_id, assigned_to_name, picking_status, status, total_pick_qty, picked_sizes, sizes - PASS
Backend: GET /api/wms/pick-tickets/stats returns total_tickets, completed, in_progress, pending counts - PASS
Backend: /pick-tickets/stats operators array includes name, completed, in_progress, assigned, total_pieces, picked_pieces - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/wms/pick-tickets/{ticket_id}/edit updates ticket fields - PASS
Backend: Edit endpoint updates operator assignment via assigned_to and assigned_to_name fields - PASS
Backend: Edit nonexistent ticket returns 404 - PASS
Backend: Edit confirmed ticket returns 400 error - PASS
Backend: Edit completed ticket returns 400 error - PASS
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthenticated) - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Customer dropdown with 13 options - PASS
Frontend: Manufacturer dropdown disabled until customer selected - PASS
Frontend: Style dropdown disabled until customer selected - PASS
Frontend: Color dropdown disabled until style selected - PASS
Frontend: Orders CRM table has 'OPERADOR / PICKING' column header - PASS
Frontend: Orders table shows operator assignment badges (Sin asignar, Juan Ope..., Juan Picker) - PASS
Frontend: Orders table shows progress bars with percentages (33%, 0%) - PASS
Frontend: Picking module has 'Pendientes (20)' tab - PASS
Frontend: Picking module has 'Completadas (7)' tab - PASS
Frontend: Picking module has 'Dashboard' tab - PASS
Frontend: Completadas tab has operator filter dropdown with 'Todos los operadores' and operators - PASS
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 metric cards: Total Tickets, Completados, En Progreso, Pendientes - PASS
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Productividad por Operador' table with % Eficiencia column - PASS
Frontend: Pending tickets have Edit (pencil) button (20 buttons found) - PASS
Frontend: Clicking Edit opens form with 'Editando: pick_xxxxx' label - PASS
Frontend: Edit form submit button shows 'Guardar Cambios' - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: inventory/options endpoint correctly returns customers array with case-insensitive deduplication
Cascading filter logic properly filters manufacturers by customer, styles by customer+manufacturer, colors by customer+style
orders-with-tickets endpoint efficiently groups tickets by order_number with all needed progress fields
pick-tickets/stats aggregates productivity data per operator including total_pieces and picked_pieces for efficiency calculation
Edit endpoint properly validates ticket status before allowing updates (rejects confirmed/completed)
Frontend cascading dropdowns disable dependent fields appropriately
Dashboard displays productivity metrics with visual progress bars and efficiency percentages
seed_data_creation: Test pick tickets created: TEST-EDIT-001, TEST-CONFIRMED-001, TEST-COMPLETED-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: WMS 4 new features fully implemented and tested: (1) Receiving cascading dropdowns (Customer->Manufacturer->Style->Color) from inventory/options endpoint, (2) Orders CRM shows Operador/Picking column with operator badges and progress bars from orders-with-tickets endpoint, (3) Picking has 3 tabs: Pendientes, Completadas with operator filter, Dashboard with productivity metrics, (4) Edit button on pending tickets opens form with 'Guardar Cambios' button, edit endpoint validates ticket not confirmed/completed. 27 pending tickets, 7 completed, 4 operators with productivity data.
